text:
Created attachment 209819
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

Version 1.7.6 was appeared in 2019-11-11.

There are no program changes that affect behavior.
New PPDs has been added.

1.7.4 (2019-10-16)
PPD file for EP-M552T series was added.

1.7.5 (2019-11-01)
PPD files for M2110 series and M2120 series were added.

1.7.6
PPD file for EC-C110 series is added.
